videoSnippet.title: The Move That Wins Every Game || Javokhir vs Vincent || Super Chess Classic Romania 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Sindarov, Javokhir (2776) - Keymer, Vincent (2759)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Chess Classic Romania 2026 (Chess.com) [07] 2026.05.21
D41 Queen's Gambit Declined, Semi-Tarrasch, 5.cd

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 c5 5.cxd5 cxd4 6.Qxd4 exd5 7.Bg5 Be7 8.Qd2 Be6 9.e3 O-O 10.Bd3 h6 11.Bf4 Nc6 12.O-O Rc8 13.a3 Qb6 14.Rac1 Rfd8 15.Na4 Qb3 16.Bc2 Qb5 17.Qd1 d4 18.Nxd4 Nxd4 19.exd4 Bd7 20.Bb3 Rxc1 21.Bxc1 Bg4 22.f3 Bc8 23.Nc3 Qh5 24.Qe2 Bd6 25.g4 Qa5 26.Ne4 Be7 27.g5 Nxe4 28.fxe4 Bxg5 29.Bxf7+ Kh8 30.b4 Qb6 31.Bxg5 hxg5 32.Qh5+ Qh6 33.d5 Bh3 34.Rf3 g4 35.Qxh6+ gxh6 36.Rf4 Rc8 37.Kf2 Rc2+ 38.Kg3 Rd2 39.Be6 h5 40.Kh4
